notes: All 12 declarations are theorems (no defs/instances). The file implements a valuation-uniqueness argument: `eq_ordAtInftyValuation_of_x_y` pins any valuation to `ordAtInftyValuation` by its values on `x_gen` and `y_gen`, and the main theorem `isTranslateOrdAtInftyCompatible_translateAlgEquivOfPoint` is the export used by 8+ downstream files in the Weil-pairing stack. `pointValuation_eq_exp_neg_of_ord_P_eq` is a local duplicate of `Curves.SmoothPlaneCurve.pointValuation_eq_exp_neg_of_ord_P_eq` defined in `L6Witnesses.lean` — consolidation candidate.
